definition: Yarrow's ability to relieve inflammation indicates its potential for reducing swelling and discomfort caused by various conditions, such as arthritis or injuries.
constituent_text: The Azulene compound helps to relieve inflammation by reducing redness and swelling, which is beneficial when treating skin conditions like eczema or acne. Azygine also aids this process by improving blood circulation. Chamazulein assists these processes as well with its antioxidant properties that protect cells from damage caused by inflammation. Flavonoids work to reduce pain and swelling, while monoterpenes provide anti-inflammatory benefits in specific locations throughout the body. Sesquiterpene lactones help balance immune response for overall health maintenance. All these compounds together contribute towards Yarrow's inflammation relieving properties.
